message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

actor "User" as User
participant "CouponPage" as CouponPage
participant "DB_Beanstalkd" as DB_Beanstalkd
participant "UserMail" as UserMail

User -> CouponPage : Load merchant page with cashback
CouponPage -->> User : Return page with discounts
User -> CouponPage : Clicks on cashback
CouponPage -->> User : Returns 2 tabs, on tab 1 the reflink to merchant,\non tab 2 a popup with cashback formular(email)
User -> CouponPage : Fills email, submits form
CouponPage -x> DB_Beanstalkd : Saves cashback request
CouponPage -->> User : Sends new content for checkout popup, simultaneosly\nopens reflink with uaid in a new tab(3)
CouponPage -x> UserMail : Sends new email with link to cashback form

@enduml
```
